experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description: Led automated testing integration within GM's DaaS Java/SpringBoot platform, boosting regression coverage to 90%. Built backend services and IMOS API integrations supporting 500+ plant users, developed reusable GraphQL query patterns, and supported production stability through an OpenShift migration.

experience.title: Software Engineer I, Test Automation
experience.description: Built reusable Java and C# test automation frameworks from scratch, expanding automated test coverage from 30% to 85% across enterprise backend integrations. Reduced manual regression testing by 60% and accelerated QA cycle times by 2 days per sprint.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Owned and maintained InDepth Lite, an Angular-based file-processing application supporting 150 users across GM’s analytics platform. Modernized 100% of legacy Angular components during a 3-month framework migration, resolving deprecated dependencies and fixing 15+ frontend UI defects with zero production disruption.

experience.title: B.S. in Informatics (Distinction)
experience.description: Graduated with a 3.8/4.0 GPA. Inducted into the Hutton Honors College and the National Society of Collegiate Scholars. Three-time recipient of the Indiana University Founders Scholar award.

experience.title: M.S. in Software Development
experience.description: Completed advanced graduate coursework focusing on Software Engineering, Software Design and Patterns, Web Application Development, and Business Database Design and Implementation.
